Class ApplicationGraph

java.lang.Object
shelter.startup.ApplicationGraph
public class ApplicationGraph extends Object
Holds the fully wired application layer created during startup. The CLI uses this graph to reach application services without knowing how repositories, domain services, strategies, and audit services are constructed.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ApplicationGraph(AnimalApplicationService animalAppService, AdopterApplicationService adopterAppService, ShelterApplicationService shelterAppService, AdoptionApplicationService adoptionAppService, TransferApplicationService transferAppService, MatchingApplicationService matchingAppService, VaccinationApplicationService vaccinationAppService, AuditApplicationService auditAppService, ExplanationService explanationService)
    Constructs the application graph from already-wired application services.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AdopterApplicationService
    adopterApp()
    Provides access to the adopter application service that orchestrates adopter-related use cases.
    AdoptionApplicationService
    adoptionApp()
    Provides access to the adoption application service that orchestrates adoption request use cases.
    AnimalApplicationService
    animalApp()
    Provides access to the animal application service that orchestrates animal-related use cases.
    AuditApplicationService
    auditApp()
    Provides access to the audit application service used to retrieve the system audit log.
    ExplanationService
    explanationService()
    Provides access to the explanation service used to generate natural-language match summaries.
    static ApplicationGraph
    from(RepositoryBundle repositories)
    Builds the service and application-service graph from repositories.
    MatchingApplicationService
    matchingApp()
    Provides access to the matching application service that orchestrates animal-adopter matching use cases.
    ShelterApplicationService
    shelterApp()
    Provides access to the shelter application service that orchestrates shelter-related use cases.
    TransferApplicationService
    transferApp()
    Provides access to the transfer application service that orchestrates inter-shelter transfer use cases.
    VaccinationApplicationService
    vaccinationApp()
    Provides access to the vaccination application service that orchestrates vaccination use cases.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ApplicationGraph

      public ApplicationGraph(AnimalApplicationService animalAppService, AdopterApplicationService adopterAppService, ShelterApplicationService shelterAppService, AdoptionApplicationService adoptionAppService, TransferApplicationService transferAppService, MatchingApplicationService matchingAppService, VaccinationApplicationService vaccinationAppService, AuditApplicationService auditAppService, ExplanationService explanationService)
      Constructs the application graph from already-wired application services. Each parameter is validated to be non-null so that callers receive an early failure rather than a NullPointerException at first use.
      Parameters:
      animalAppService - the application service for animal use cases
      adopterAppService - the application service for adopter use cases
      shelterAppService - the application service for shelter use cases
      adoptionAppService - the application service for adoption request use cases
      transferAppService - the application service for inter-shelter transfer use cases
      matchingAppService - the application service for animal-adopter matching use cases
      vaccinationAppService - the application service for vaccination use cases
      auditAppService - the application service for audit log retrieval
      explanationService - the service that generates natural-language match summaries

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static ApplicationGraph from(RepositoryBundle repositories)
      Builds the service and application-service graph from repositories.
      Parameters:
      repositories - the repository bundle created during startup
      Returns:
      the fully wired application graph

    • animalApp

      public AnimalApplicationService animalApp()
      Provides access to the animal application service that orchestrates animal-related use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the animal application service

    • adopterApp

      public AdopterApplicationService adopterApp()
      Provides access to the adopter application service that orchestrates adopter-related use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the adopter application service

    • shelterApp

      public ShelterApplicationService shelterApp()
      Provides access to the shelter application service that orchestrates shelter-related use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the shelter application service

    • adoptionApp

      public AdoptionApplicationService adoptionApp()
      Provides access to the adoption application service that orchestrates adoption request use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the adoption request application service

    • transferApp

      public TransferApplicationService transferApp()
      Provides access to the transfer application service that orchestrates inter-shelter transfer use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the transfer request application service

    • matchingApp

      public MatchingApplicationService matchingApp()
      Provides access to the matching application service that orchestrates animal-adopter matching use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the matching application service

    • vaccinationApp

      public VaccinationApplicationService vaccinationApp()
      Provides access to the vaccination application service that orchestrates vaccination use cases. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the vaccination application service

    • auditApp

      public AuditApplicationService auditApp()
      Provides access to the audit application service used to retrieve the system audit log. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the audit application service

    • explanationService

      public ExplanationService explanationService()
      Provides access to the explanation service used to generate natural-language match summaries. Returns the instance stored in this graph during construction.
      Returns:
      the explanation service
